allow: Bash(find /c/sms/saas-erp/src/pages -name '*.tsx' -type f -exec sh -c 'lines=$\(wc -l < "$1"\); if [ "$lines" -lt 30 ]; then echo "$\(basename $1\) \($lines lines\)"; fi' _ '{}' ';')
Bash(find /c/sms/saas-erp/src/pages -name '*.tsx' -type f -exec sh -c 'lines=$\(wc -l < "$1"\); if [ "$lines" -ge 30 ]; then echo "✓ $\(basename $1\)"; fi' _ '{}' ';')
